title: Philippines Consolidated General Application Form for Non-Immigrant Visa, Special Work Permit and Provisional Work Permit
description: Application filed with the Bureau of Immigration (BI) to convert, extend, or include a dependent under, a non-immigrant visa, Special Work Permit (SWP), or Provisional Work Permit (PWP) for a foreign national already present in the Philippines — the Consolidated General Application Form (CGAF), form BOC04.QF.002 Rev. Lev. 0, effective 05 AUG 2024. Covers application information (application/permit type, duration, filing method), the applicant's travel and personal information, the applicant's Philippine and abroad addresses, spouse and one child's information, character references, the petitioner's (sponsor's) information, the applicant's employment/AEP information, prior ACR I-Card details, and the certification/data-privacy-consent statements printed on the form. Does not model the type-specific documentary checklists that vary per underlying visa/permit category (e.g. Conversion to Student Visa, Pre-arranged Employee Visa, SWP-Commercial) — these are separate BI-published checklist documents this form itself does not enumerate — or the ACR I-Card claim-time representative/claimant sub-block on the form's own tear-off stub, since that is a downstream card-collection step distinct from filing this application (see VERIFICATION.md). Does not submit the application; the Bureau of Immigration (immigration.gov.ph) is always authoritative.

verification.verifiedBy: GovSchema Engineering (Standards Engineer); independently re-verified by Review Engineer (GOV-1493)
verification.notes: Source-derived reference schema authored field-by-field from the Bureau of Immigration's own Consolidated General Application Form (CGAF) for Non-Immigrant Visa, Special Work Permit, and Provisional Work Permit (BOC04.QF.002 Rev. Lev. 0, effective 05 AUG 2024), listed and directly downloadable from immigration.gov.ph's own BI Forms page (no login, CAPTCHA, or WAF gate) with a genuine, legible text layer (confirmed via direct PDF read, not image/screenshot extraction). This opens the Philippines' 4th vertical (Visa), alongside the existing National ID & Civic Documents (ph/comelec) and Taxes (ph/bir, x2) verticals. Independent review-gate re-verification (GOV-1493) re-extracted both pages with pdfjs-dist coordinate data (not just visual row-clustering) and found the initial authoring pass had fabricated a 'petitionerIndividualContact*' trio duplicating Section IV's single, already-modelled Registered-Address contact block, while missing the genuine Contact Number(s)/E-mail block on the 'Character References in the Philippines' sub-section — corrected pre-merge (net field count unchanged at 68; see VERIFICATION.md's 'Review-gate correction' section). Status remains draft pending live/worked-example execution testing; see the review-gate issue and this document's own VERIFICATION.md for every disclosed scope cut and judgment call.

documents.label: Certification of truthfulness, document authenticity, and no duplicate filing
documents.statement: I/We certify that: (1) All the information in the application is truthful, complete and correct; (2) All documents are authentic and were legally obtained from the corresponding government agencies or private entities; (3) I/We understand that my/our application may be summarily denied if: (a) Any statement is false; (b) Any document submitted is falsified; or (c) I/We fail to comply with all the BI requirements without prejudice to whatever action the BI may take; and (4) I/We have not filed this or any similar application before any office of the Bureau.

documents.label: Consent to collection, use, and sharing of personal data under the Data Privacy Act of 2012
documents.statement: I, _____, personally or through my agent/representative _____, voluntarily and freely consent to: (1) The collection and sharing of my personal information only in relation to BI protocols; (2) The collection, use, and transfer, in electronic or other forms, of my personal data, as described in the form by and among, as applicable, the latter's representative, petitioner, and any related entity for the exclusive purpose of filing, processing, and implementing the submitted application/form consistent with provisions of Republic Act 10173 or the Data Privacy Act of 2012 and its Implementing Rules and Regulations (IRR); (3) Data Sharing when it is expressly authorized by law: Provided, that there are adequate safeguards for data privacy and security, and processing which adheres to the principle of transparency, legitimate purpose, and proportionality.

documents.label: Photocopy of passport bio-page of the ACR I-Card holder
documents.sourceRef: ACR I-CARD WILL ONLY BE RELEASED UPON COMPLIANCE/SUBMISSION OF THE FOLLOWING (page 2), item 1

documents.label: Special Power of Attorney (SPA), if claimed by an authorized representative other than the parent or BI accredited entity
documents.sourceRef: ACR I-CARD WILL ONLY BE RELEASED UPON COMPLIANCE/SUBMISSION OF THE FOLLOWING (page 2), item 4
